articles.title: FTX selects GameStop as retail partner in the US
articles.description: GameStop has revealed a new partnership with FTX US targeted at introducing its customers to “FTX’s community and marketplaces for digital assets,” according to a September 7 press release.

articles.title: Crypto Exchange FTX Announces Partnership With GameStop
articles.description: According to a press release, crypto exchange FTX will partner with GameStop (GME). The partners will cooperate to gain the interest of GameStop clients for cryptocurrencies, and onboard them into the FTX ecosystem. articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson Lambasts Ethereum Classic, Sees No Reason To Invest In It
articles.description: However, despite this growth, Cardano's Charles Hoskinson has criticized the chain’s community, suggesting that ETC investments could also backfire.

articles.title: Zero Bitcoin Fees & USDC Delisting: How Binance Is Pushing For Larger Marketshare
articles.description: The crypto exchange Binance has recently continued to push for growth in its share of the Bitcoin volume, as well as the stablecoin market. articles.title: Avalanche DeFi Staking Platform Suffers Flash Loan Attack
articles.description: The exploiter drained $370,000 in USDC stablecoin.

articles.title: Attacker scoops $370,000 profit in $51 million flash loan arbitrage on Avalanche
articles.description: One crypto arbitrageur was able to gain $370,000 from a flash loan exploit on the Avalanche-based DeFi platform Nereus Finance.

articles.title: Terra Luna Classic (LUNC) Erupts Over 111% in Less Than a Week Following News of Second Airdrop
articles.description: The native token of the original Terra blockchain, Luna Classic (LUNC), is surging after a proposal to reward holders with free tokens of its successor blockchain, Terra (LUNA), passed. Starting on September 2nd, Luna Classic surged by slightly over 111% from $0.000215 to a two-month high of $0.000455. Luna Classic is trading at $0.000390 at […]

articles.description: Flash loan attack on Avalanche detected by cybersecurity firm CertiK
